TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Eric Bledsoe nalecuhan i Birmingham, Alabama, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Eric Bledsoe i 2010 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Oklahoma City Thunder putiput. 12 bulad 9 demiad, 1989 a mihca, Eric Bledsoe, miunduay.
S.PHON: …ôri ¶ br~…ĺ…ôdso…ô nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i birmiŇčńßam, ar~…ĺabama, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, pańßanńßanan tu kawaw ajza. …ôri ¶ br~…ĺ…ôdso…ô i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu okr~…ĺańßoma ¶itj tńßund…ôr putiput. ** bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, …ôri ¶ br~…ĺ…ôdso…ô, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Eric Bledsoe nalecuhan i Birmingham, Alabama, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Eric Bledsoe i 2010 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 18, namapili' tu nu Oklahoma City Thunder putiput. 12 bulad 9 demiad, 1989 a mihca, Eric Bledsoe, miunduay.
